title: Term and Survival
text: This Agreement shall commence on the Effective Date and continue for a period of two (2) years, unless earlier terminated by mutual written consent of the Parties. Notwithstanding termination or expiry, the obligations of confidentiality shall survive for a further period of three (3) years in respect of Confidential Information that does not constitute a trade secret, and indefinitely in respect of trade secrets. Either Party may terminate this Agreement by providing thirty (30) days' written notice to the other Party.
name: NDA Duration and Survival

legal_basis.note: Duration must be reasonable to be enforceable

dispute_hotspots: Survival period expired — party claims CI protection still applies to trade secrets
